result.summary: sub_layer_0_02_context_agents contains 7 files implementing AALang context loading and orchestration agents

agents_identified.name: Context Loading Agent
agents_identified.purpose: Loads and validates CLAUDE.md chain before work begins

agents_identified.name: Layer 0 Universal Orchestrator
agents_identified.purpose: Manages child agents across all layers

content.purpose_summary: This sub_layer implements AALang context agents for managing context loading in the layer-stage system. The Context Loading Agent uses a 4-phase sequence (Loading → Validation → Propagation → Delivery) to ensure AI agents understand their position and applicable rules before starting work. The Layer 0 Orchestrator manages hierarchical agent coordination with safeguards for max depth (5), concurrent limits (3), task similarity checking, and circuit breakers. Key extension beyond base AALang: cross-session persistence via context_state.json.
key_features: 4-phase context loading sequence with confidence thresholds (0.6 for loading, 0.8 for work)
Senior/Junior persona pairs for deliberation per mode
Layer inheritance model (higher layers can override lower, with safety protections)
Orchestrator with depth limits, concurrent limits, and circuit breakers
